title: ctenopteris subsessilis
intro: Ctenopteris subsessilis, also known as New Zealand maidenhair fern, is a species of fern native to New Zealand. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate respiratory issues. The health benefits of Ctenopteris subsessilis include its potential to treat bronchitis, coughs, and skin irritations, thanks to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
